description_long: This object consists of two wooden chairs with upholstered seats, each featuring a distinct backrest design. The left chair has a decorative openwork back with interlacing wooden elements, while the right chair has a tall, solid backrest with an octagonal top and a patterned fabric panel. Both chairs have cushioned seats, with the left seat covered in a striped beige fabric and the right seat in a patterned beige fabric. The legs are robust and slightly curved, giving a traditional and sturdy appearance. The wood is finished in a dark brown stain, and the upholstery adds a touch of comfort and elegance. These chairs are suitable for formal dining or meeting spaces in urban indoor environments.
description: A pair of wooden chairs with cushioned, patterned seats and distinct decorative backrests, finished in dark brown wood and beige upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing both chairs' unique backrest designs and patterned upholstered seats.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the backrests and the depth of the cushioned seats.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood and openwork backrest designs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the legs and seat cushions.
